---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow GitEasy should support
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like GitEasy to do?

Plain-English description of the workflow.

## Why?

What problem does this solve, and how often do you hit it?

## Proposed command shape (optional)

If you have an idea of how the command should look, sketch it. Remember GitEasy avoids Git terminology in user-facing names, parameters, and messages.

```powershell
Verb-Noun -Param ...
```

## Anything else?
